allow: Bash(python3 -c "import playwright; import dotenv; import pypdf; import httpx; print\(''All imports OK''\)")

Bash(DISPLAY=:99 python3 -c "
import logging, os, time
os.environ['DISPLAY'] = ':99'
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.WARNING\)
from services.browser.browser_service import BrowserService
from config.settings import NAUKRI_LOGIN_URL

browser = BrowserService\(\)
page = browser.launch\(\)
try:
    page.goto\(NAUKRI_LOGIN_URL, wait_until='domcontentloaded'\)
    time.sleep\(3\)
    html = page.content\(\)
    with open\('/tmp/login_page.html', 'w'\) as f:
        f.write\(html\)
    print\('HTML size:', len\(html\)\)
    import re
    inputs = re.findall\(r'<input[^>]+>', html, re.I\)
    for i in inputs:
        print\('INPUT:', i[:200]\)
    buttons = re.findall\(r'<button[^>]+>', html, re.I\)
    for b in buttons[:10]:
        print\('BUTTON:', b[:200]\)
finally:
    browser.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(DISPLAY=:99 python3 -c "
import logging, os, time
os.environ['DISPLAY'] = ':99'
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.WARNING\)
from services.browser.browser_service import BrowserService
from config.settings import NAUKRI_LOGIN_URL

browser = BrowserService\(\)
page = browser.launch\(\)
try:
    page.goto\(NAUKRI_LOGIN_URL, wait_until='networkidle'\)
    time.sleep\(4\)
    html = page.content\(\)
    with open\('/tmp/login_page.html', 'w'\) as f:
        f.write\(html\)
    print\('HTML size:', len\(html\)\)
    import re
    inputs = re.findall\(r'<input[^>]+>', html, re.I\)
    for i in inputs:
        print\('INPUT:', i[:200]\)
    buttons = re.findall\(r'<button[^>]+>', html, re.I\)
    for b in buttons[:10]:
        print\('BUTTON:', b[:200]\)
finally:
    browser.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(DISPLAY=:99 python3 -c "
import logging, os
os.environ['DISPLAY'] = ':99'
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.INFO, format='%\(asctime\)s [%\(levelname\)s] %\(name\)s - %\(message\)s'\)
from services.browser.browser_service import BrowserService
from services.auth.login_service import LoginService
from services.profile.profile_service import ProfileService

browser = BrowserService\(\)
page = browser.launch\(\)
try:
    LoginService\(page\).ensure_logged_in\(\)
    result = ProfileService\(page\).update\(\)
    print\('--- RESULT ---'\)
    print\('Prev headline:', result['prev_headline']\)
    print\('New headline: ', result['new_headline']\)
    print\('Prev summary: ', result['prev_summary'][:80]\)
    print\('New summary:  ', result['new_summary'][:80]\)
    print\('Resume path:  ', result['resume_path']\)
finally:
    browser.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(DISPLAY=:99 python3 - << 'EOF'
import logging, sys
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.INFO, format="%\(asctime\)s [%\(levelname\)s] %\(message\)s", stream=sys.stdout\)
from services.browser.browser_service import BrowserService
from services.auth.login_service import LoginService
from config.settings import NAUKRI_PROFILE_URL

browser = BrowserService\(\)
page = browser.launch\(\)
try:
    LoginService\(page\).ensure_logged_in\(\)
    page.wait_for_timeout\(3000\)
    page.screenshot\(path="/tmp/profile_page.png", full_page=True\)
    print\("Screenshot saved"\)
    # Dump headline section HTML
    html = page.evaluate\("""\(\) => {
        const el = document.querySelector\('#lazyResumeHead'\) || document.querySelector\('.resumeHeadline'\);
        return el ? el.outerHTML.substring\(0, 2000\) : 'NOT FOUND';
    }"""\)
    print\("Headline section HTML:", html\)
finally:
    browser.close\(\)
EOF)

Bash(DISPLAY=:99 python3 - << 'EOF'
import logging, sys
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.INFO, stream=sys.stdout\)
from services.browser.browser_service import BrowserService
from services.auth.login_service import LoginService

browser = BrowserService\(\)
page = browser.launch\(\)
try:
    LoginService\(page\).ensure_logged_in\(\)
    page.wait_for_timeout\(3000\)

    selectors = [
        "#lazyResumeHead .widgetHead span.edit.icon",
        ".resumeHeadline .widgetHead span.edit.icon",
        "span.edit.icon",
    ]
    for sel in selectors:
        count = page.locator\(sel\).count\(\)
        print\(f"Selector '{sel}' → count={count}"\)
        if count > 0:
            visible = page.locator\(sel\).first.is_visible\(\)
            print\(f"  visible={visible}"\)

    # Try force clicking directly
    loc = page.locator\("#lazyResumeHead .widgetHead span.edit.icon"\).first
    loc.scroll_into_view_if_needed\(timeout=5000\)
    loc.click\(force=True\)
    page.wait_for_timeout\(2000\)
    form_visible = page.locator\("form[name='resumeHeadlineForm']"\).is_visible\(\)
    print\(f"Form visible after click: {form_visible}"\)
finally:
    browser.close\(\)
EOF)
